The '''''Victory II''-class frigate''' was a sword-shaped [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Victory_ll_frigate.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A ''Victory II''-class [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] over [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin IV]].]]
Its design was reminiscent of large command ships like the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance (Vengeance-class)|''Vengeance'']], due to the large wing-like extension on each side of the ship's rear, as well as its slim profile. Its armament included several [[Autoturret/Legends|twin autoturrets]] and it was powered by three large [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]].

It also roughly resembled [[Vindicator-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Vindicator''-class heavy cruisers]] in shape and size, and had a small, slim bridge-section quite like the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]].

==History==
Ships of this class participated in the [[Yavin blockade|Blockade of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], acting as escorts to the larger [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyers]].<ref name="BF2" /> 

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], one of these vessels belonging to an [[Imperial Remnant]] participated in the [[Battle of Shramar]]. Following the battle, it jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] together with the rest of the joint Imperial/[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] task force, nearby to the [[Heart of Artorias|''Heart of Artorias'']] as the [[Outer Rim Alliance]] was formed.<ref name="Invasion: Revelations 5">[[Invasion: Revelations 5|''Invasion: Revelations'' 5]]</ref>

==Appearances==

*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''
*[[Invasion: Revelations 5|''Invasion: Revelations'' 5]]
